title: Zero Waste Lifestyle Essentials Flat Lay on Linen Background
description: Flat lay of zero waste lifestyle essentials including a bamboo toothbrush, metal straws with cleaning brush, reusable cloth bags, glass jars filled with lentils, chickpeas, and oats, a wooden dish brush, and beeswax food wraps, all arranged on a natural linen fabric background. The image features neutral tones and natural textures, emphasizing eco-friendly and sustainable living without any visible branding or logos.
